name: Job Search Pipeline - Native n8n v3

parameters.content:
## Job Search Pipeline

**Flow 1:** Every 6h - Fetch RemoteOK -> Filter -> AI Rate -> Append 7+ to Sheet
**Flow 2:** Daily 7am - Read Sheet -> Generate Cover Letters for checked rows
**Flow 3:** Manual trigger - same as Flow 1

No SplitInBatches loops. All AI processing in Code nodes.
